title: A Successful Woman
overview: Through moments of humor, tension, and vulnerability, Esther learns that true love isn't measured by wealth or status but by authenticity, self-growth, and unexpected connections. As secrets unravel and betrayals surface, she must decide: Will she embrace the life she truly wants, or succumb to the one others have chosen for her? This is a powerful story of healing, resilience, and the courage to redefine happiness on one's own terms.
